sources.title: Nvidia-backed AI voice startup ElevenLabs hits $11 billion valuation in fresh fundraise
sources.claim: ElevenLabs raised $500M Series D at $11B valuation, backed by Nvidia, Sequoia, and a16z — more than tripling its $3.3B valuation from January 2025

sources.title: AI video startup Runway raises $315M at $5.3B valuation, eyes more capable world models
sources.claim: Runway raised $315M at $5.3B valuation; targeting world models for cinematic video generation; key investors include General Atlantic and Google

sources.title: ElevenLabs revenue, valuation & funding
sources.claim: ElevenLabs estimated $500M ARR by April 2026, up from $350M at end of 2025 and $180M Series C in 2024

sources.title: HeyGen revenue, valuation & funding
sources.claim: HeyGen reached $100M ARR in 2025, tripling from $35M in 2024; total raised $74.6M across 3 rounds

sources.title: Creator Economy Market Size 2026
sources.claim: Creator economy projected at $313B in 2026; tools/infrastructure sub-segment growing at 41% YoY — fastest of any creator economy category; Goldman Sachs projects $480B TAM by 2027

sources.title: Artificial Intelligence in Creator Economy Market Report 2026
sources.claim: AI in creator economy market grew from $4.35B (2025) to $5.71B (2026) at 31.3% CAGR; projected to reach $16.81B by 2030

sources.title: AI Powered Content Creation Market Report 2033
sources.claim: AI-powered content creation market growing at 19.4% CAGR from 2025 to 2033; segment projected to reach $10.6B by 2033

sources.title: Creator Economy Market Size 2026: $260B | CAGR 22%
sources.claim: Creator economy market size at $260–313B in 2026 at 22% CAGR; 86% of creators report using generative AI in day-to-day work

sources.title: AI Startup Runway Raises $308 Million Funding at $3 Billion Valuation
sources.claim: Prior Runway funding round of $308M at $3B valuation in 2025 — showing trajectory to $5.3B in Feb 2026

sources.title: Gen AI Video Startup Runway Raises $315M Led By General Atlantic At $5.3B Valuation
sources.claim: Runway raises $315M Series E led by General Atlantic at $5.3B valuation; ~$300M ARR as of early 2026

unverified_claims.note: Estimated from AI creator tools market growing from ~$300M (2021, pre-Midjourney/ChatGPT) to ~$5.3B (2026). No single source directly states the 2021 baseline for this specific segment. Conservative estimate flagged.
Based on Adobe Creative Cloud's reported subscriber count; Firefly adoption within that base is not separately disclosed.

Cited by multiple creator economy survey sources (aistoollab.com, directai.app, zemith.com) for 2026 but primary survey methodology not audited. Consistent with 86% figure cited by New Market Pitch and 78% for video creators specifically.
